extractions.text: George Bliss survived the Carrington Event.

extractions.text: He continued working at the Boston telegraph office for two more years.

extractions.text: Then, in eighteen sixty-one, he resigned.

extractions.text: He moved to a farm in Vermont.

extractions.text: When the electrical grid arrived decades later, he refused to connect his house.
